task_completion.description: Open the InsectSprays.csv dataset in Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window is open, displaying the 'InsectSprays' dataset with columns for 'count' and 'spray' in the data view.

task_completion.description: Filter the dataset to include only spray types 'C' and 'F'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter is visible in the data tab (e.g., `spray == 'C' or spray == 'F'`), and rows with other spray types (A, B, D, E) are grayed out or hidden in the spreadsheet view.

task_completion.description: Set up the Independent Samples T-Test with correct variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis setup panel, 'count' is placed in the 'Dependent Variables' box and 'spray' is placed in the 'Grouping Variable' box.

task_completion.description: Select the Mann-Whitney U test and Group Descriptives options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis setup panel, the 'Mann-Whitney U' checkbox (under Tests) is selected, and the 'Descriptives' checkbox (under Additional Statistics) is selected.

task_completion.description: Generate the analysis results for the filtered groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right-hand results panel displays the Independent Samples T-Test table containing the Mann-Whitney U statistic, and a 'Group Descriptives' table specifically showing data for groups 'C' and 'F'.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'InsectSprays_MannWhitney.omv' in the '~/Documents/Jamovi/' directory, or the main Jamovi window title bar updates to 'InsectSprays_MannWhitney.omv'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands executing a script.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely generated by Jamovi.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results panel shows properly formatted Jamovi output tables (HTML/rich text style) rather than plain text pasted into a document.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Jamovi save dialog or menu is visible in the screenshots, indicating the file wasn't just created or renamed via the terminal.
